resources.string: Transform your phone into two completely separate devices. Each profile has its own apps, data, photos, contacts, and lock screen credential.\n\nWhen you unlock the phone, the system automatically loads the profile that matches your credential. No app launcher needed — full system integration.
Dual Persona System needs special permissions to manage user profiles at the system level.
This is your primary profile. You\'ll set its name and lock screen credential through Android\'s security settings.
A secondary Android user will be created with a completely separate environment. Each user gets their own storage, apps, and credentials.
Your device doesn\'t support multi-user mode. The app will work in limited mode.
Configure advanced security options for maximum protection.
Your credential is set through Android\'s system security settings. We never store your actual password or pattern.
When enabled, the app completely disappears from your phone. Access it anytime by dialing your secret code on the phone keypad.

IMPORTANT: Each user sets their own credential through Android Settings > Security. When the system lock screen appears, just enter the credential for the profile you want to access. The system automatically loads the correct profile.

Dual Persona System is now active.

To switch profiles:
1. Lock your phone
2. Unlock with the other profile's credential
3. The system loads that profile automatically

To access settings: Dial *#*#7890#*#* on the phone keypad.
WARNING: This will remove the secondary user and ALL their data. This action CANNOT be undone.
